transcript: Speaker A: आपली जोडी लोकांना खूप आवडते. आपण नेहमी सोबत राहूया. [Our pairing is loved by people. Let's always stay together.] Speaker B: Pav, you're still with Vada? I mean, he can't even speak proper English. Speaker A: तो ट्राय करतोय. [He is trying.] Speaker B: Hahaha... he will never be able to speak fluent English like me. Speaker A: मिसळ बरोबर बोलतोय. तुझ्यासोबत राहून माझं इम्प्रेशन डाऊन होतंय. आजपासून आपलं संपलं. [Misal is right. Staying with you is bringing down my impression. From today, we are over.] Speaker C: नाही वडा, रडून नाही जमणार तुला. तुला पावला दाखवावं लागणार, तूही इंग्लिश बोलू शकतोस. [No Vada, crying won't help. You have to show Pav that you can also speak English.] Speaker C: रोज १५ मिनिटे AI टीचर सोबत इंग्लिश बोलायची प्रॅक्टिस केली. ग्रामर सुधारलं, प्रोनाउन्शिएशन क्लिअर झालं आणि हळूहळू कॉन्फिडन्स वाढला. [Practiced speaking English with AI teacher for 15 minutes daily. Grammar improved, pronunciation became clear, and gradually confidence increased.] Speaker D: There was a time when someone rejected me because of my bad English... That was the turning point of my life. Today, I can speak confidently... because I worked on myself. Speaker B: अरे, वडा इंग्लिश मध्ये बोलतोय! हे कसं शक्य आहे? [Hey, Vada is speaking in English! How is this possible?] Speaker A: मी वड्याला सोडून खूप मोठी चूक केली. [I made a big mistake by leaving Vada.] Speaker E: जर वडा इंग्लिश शिकू शकतो, तर तुम्हीही नक्की शिकू शकता. आजच MySivi App डाऊनलोड करा आणि फक्त ₹१ च्या ट्रायल मध्ये तुमची इंग्लिश स्पीकिंग जर्नी सुरू करा. कॉन्फिडन्स आला की रिस्पेक्ट आपोआप मिळतो. [If Vada can learn English, you can definitely learn too. Download MySivi App today and start your English speaking journey in just a ₹1 trial. Once confidence comes, respect follows automatically.]
on_screen_text: आपली जोडी लोकांना [Our pairing to people] आपण नेहमी सोबत [We always together] you're still try करतोय [trying] Haa Haa... he will to speak fluent English like TWO DAYS LATER... मिसळ बरोबर [Misal is right] तुझ्यासोबत राहून [Staying with you] माझं impression [My impression] आजपासून [From today] नाही [No] रडून नाही [No crying] तुला पावला [You to Pav] लागणार तूही [will have to, you too] रोज 15 मिनिटे [Daily 15 minutes] practice केली [practiced] grammar सुधारलं [grammar improved] हळूहळू confidence [gradually confidence] TWO WEEKS LATER There was a time when someone because of my bad English... turning point Today I can speak because I worked अरे [Hey] वडा English मध्ये [Vada in English] हे कसं शक्य [How is this possible] पावला वाटलं [Pav felt] सोडून खूप मोठी [leaving, very big] जर वडा English [If Vada English] शिकू शकतो... [can learn...] तर तुम्हीही नक्की [then you too definitely] शिकू शकता [can learn] आजच MySivi App [Today itself MySivi App] download करा [download] आणि फक्त ₹1 च्या [and only for ₹1] trial मध्ये तुमची [trial, your] English speaking सुरू करा [start] confidence आला [confidence comes] की respect [then respect]
summary: An animated Vada is dumped by Pav because he cannot speak English, choosing Misal instead. Vada uses the MySivi AI English Speaking App to practice daily, improving his grammar and pronunciation. Two weeks later, Vada speaks fluent English in a news interview, making Pav regret her decision, and Vada invites viewers to start their English journey with a ₹1 trial.
